name: player_fantasy_points_per_game_from_seasonlogs range year_offset takes the window AVG (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with 2024 points_per_game=10 and 2025 points_per_game=30, then run player_fantasy_points_per_game_from_seasonlogs with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. The per-game average must equal the window AVG (20), not the SUM (40) -- a player cannot average 40 PPG across two seasons. Proves non-additive seasonlog rates reduce with AVG, not the default SUM.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT AVG(scoring_format_player_seasonlogs.points_per_game) FROM scoring_format_player_seasonlogs WHERE scoring_format_player_seasonlogs.pid = player.pid AND scoring_format_player_seasonlogs.year IN (2024,2025) AND scoring_format_player_seasonlogs.scoring_format_id = 'draftkings') AS "points_per_game_from_seasonlogs_0", "player"."pos" from "player" where player.pos IN ('ZZ') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-SCOR-2000-2000-01-01', 'Test', 'Scor', 'T.Scor', 'Test Scor', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)

INSERT INTO scoring_format_player_seasonlogs (pid, year, points, points_per_game, games, points_rnk, points_pos_rnk, points_per_game_rnk, points_per_game_pos_rnk, scoring_format_id) VALUES ('TEST-SCOR-2000-2000-01-01', 2024, 100, 10.0, 10, 50, 10, 50, 10, 'draftkings')

INSERT INTO scoring_format_player_seasonlogs (pid, year, points, points_per_game, games, points_rnk, points_pos_rnk, points_per_game_rnk, points_per_game_pos_rnk, scoring_format_id) VALUES ('TEST-SCOR-2000-2000-01-01', 2025, 300, 30.0, 10, 30, 6, 30, 6, 'draftkings')
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT AVG(points_per_game) AS points_per_game_from_seasonlogs_0 FROM scoring_format_player_seasonlogs WHERE pid = 'TEST-SCOR-2000-2000-01-01' AND year IN (2024,2025) AND scoring_format_id = 'draftkings'
